hero.headline: Professional Cleaning You Can Trust

items.title: Available 24/7
items.description: We work any day, any time — including weekends and holidays.

items.title: Free Estimate

items.title: Trusted Professionals

promo.headline: First floor cleaning is on us.
promo.body: Sign up for regular cleaning service and we'll clean your floors — including carpets — for free on the first visit.

items.a: Yes! We visit your space at no charge and give you a detailed quote with no commitment required.
Absolutely. We work 7 days a week, including weekends and holidays. Just give us a call.

items.q: What types of spaces do you clean?
items.a: We clean homes, apartments, offices, restaurants, bars, warehouses, kitchens, and building common areas.

items.q: What does the free first floor cleaning include?
items.a: When you sign up for a regular cleaning plan, we clean all your floors on the first visit at no extra charge — including carpet cleaning.

items.q: Can you work with my budget?
items.a: Yes. We'll put together a cleaning plan tailored to your needs and budget. Just tell us what you're looking for.
We serve Redmond, Bend, Prineville, La Pine, Sisters, Terrebonne, and Madras in Central Oregon.
